case_title: PEARL MAROCCIA VS. VERNON FARRIS et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAROCCIA, PEARL AS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTATE OF PATSY MARCOCCIA JR AKA PAT MARCOCCIA DECEASED AS TO DEFENDANT FARRIS, VERNON FARRIS, DALE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-19-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-18-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-22-2002
